de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.instructions

Class Instruction<OP extends Operator>

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.match.vm.instructions.Instruction<OP>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    MatchInstruction
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    MatchElementaryUpdateInstruction, MatchOpIdentityInstruction, MatchSchemaVariableInstruction, MatchSortDependingFunctionInstruction

    public abstract class Instruction<OP extends Operator>
extends Object
implements MatchInstruction
    enum encoding the instructions of the matching vm

      • match

        public abstract MatchConditions match(Term instantiationCandidate,
                    MatchConditions matchCond,
                    Services services)
        tries to match the schema variable of this instruction with the specified Term instantiationCandidate w.r.t. the given constraints by MatchConditions
        Parameters:
        instantiationCandidate - the Term to be matched
        matchCond - the MatchConditions with additional constraints (e.g. previous matches of this schemavariable)
        services - the Services
        Returns:
        null if no matches have been found or the new MatchConditions with the pair (sv, instantiationCandidate) added
